---
title: "workflow"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-15"
---


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(tibble)
ftir_pigmenti <- read_excel("ftir_pigmenti_rev_2.xlsx")
d <- as_tibble(ftir_pigmenti) |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "nume_rand") |> 
  column_to_rownames(var = "Nume") |> 
  mutate_if(is.character, as.factor)
  

```

#EDA
```{r}
library(factoextra)
library(FactoMineR)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)

X <- PCA(d[,-c(1:6)], scale.unit = TRUE, graph = F)

pca_res <- X$ind$coord |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "nume_rand")


d <- d %>% 
full_join(pca_res)


d %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Lustru)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = Angoba), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA tot") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = Color), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA tot") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")


d %>% filter(Color == "rosu") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1) +
  ggtitle("PCA rosu") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color == "alb") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA alb") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color == "negru") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Sursa, color = Angoba)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 1, 
    nudge_y = 1, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA negru") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Color == "blank") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Sursa)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA blank") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Sursa == "Luturi") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  )+
  ggtitle("PCA luturi") +
   scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")

d %>% filter(Sursa == "Placute") %>% 
ggplot(aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, shape = Angoba, color = Color)) + 
    geom_point(aes(size = 2), position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(
    label = ID), 
    nudge_x = 2, 
    nudge_y = 2, 
    check_overlap = T
  ) +
  ggtitle("PCA Placute") +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "H")


```

```{r}
pca_var_contrib <- get_pca_var(X)$contrib |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()

write_xlsx(pca_var_contrib, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/contributii_dim_1.xlsx")

Dim.1 <- pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.1, n = 150)
 
  Dim.1 |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.1, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Contribuții la CP 1") +
  ylab(label = "")

Dim.2 <- pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.2, n = 150)

write_xlsx(pca_var_contrib, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/contributii_dim_2.xlsx")

 
graph_dim2_contrib <- 
  Dim.2 |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.2)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.2, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Contribuții la CP 2") +
  ylab(label = "")


  

```

```{r}
library(writexl)

pca_var_cor <- get_pca_var(X)$cor |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column()
write_xlsx(pca_var_cor, path = "C:/Users/georg/OneDrive/Proiecte_R/FTIR_Pigmenti/corelatii_dim_1si2.xlsx")



Dim.1.cor <- bind_rows(pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.1, n = 75), 
  pca_var_cor |> slice_min(Dim.1, n = 75)
  ) 
 


graph_dim1_cor <- 
  Dim.1.cor |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.1)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.1, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Corelație cu CP 1") +
  ylab(label = "")

Dim.2.cor <- bind_rows(pca_var_cor |> slice_max(Dim.2, n = 75), 
  pca_var_cor |> slice_min(Dim.2, n = 75)
  ) 
 
graph_dim2_cor <- 
  Dim.2.cor |> 
  mutate(rowname = fct_reorder(rowname, Dim.2)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(Dim.2, rowname)) +
  geom_col() +
  xlab(label = "Corelație cu CP 2") +
  ylab(label = "")

```
